fingerprint: validation:the requirement that the exec backend document read-only behavior as trusted/best-effort is not backed by a runnable validation check.
message: The requirement that the exec backend document read-only behavior as trusted/best-effort is not backed by a runnable validation check.
material_impact: An implementation could pass the listed validation commands while omitting the required documentation, leaving this acceptance criterion only manually reviewable.
fix_direction: Name the expected documentation location and add a runnable check, for example a targeted test or script assertion that verifies the trusted/best-effort language exists in the package doc, README, or generated help text.

fingerprint: validation:the validation commands only compile-and-skip the exec integration test; they never provide a gate that runs the real-agy integration path.
message: The validation commands only compile-and-skip the exec integration test; they never provide a gate that runs the real-agy integration path.
material_impact: A change could implement the wrong real-agy command flags while all listed validation commands still pass, because the only exec_integration command explicitly unsets the env var and requires the test to skip.
fix_direction: Either add a separate optional/manual validation command that runs with DEBATE_EXEC_INTEGRATION set in an environment where agy is available, or weaken the acceptance criterion to say the gate only compiles the integration test and verifies the skip behavior.
